title: vec orphan-list response (v1.0.69)
description: Response shape of `sqlite-graphrag vec orphan-list --json`. Added in v1.0.69 as part of G39 to surface vec_memories, vec_entities, and vec_chunks rows whose parent was soft-deleted or never existed.

namespace.description: Namespace the orphan scan ran in

count.description: Total number of orphan vector rows across all three vec tables

orphans.description: List of orphan vectors, each tagged with the source table kind

vector_hash.description: Hex-encoded BLAKE3 hash of the orphan vector, used as the deduplication key in vec_purge

kind.description: Source table of the orphan row
